transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, I'm Priya from Supreme Petrochemicals, Chennai. Is this a good time for a quick 30-second conversation?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Yes go ahead, I'm Ravi, head of procurement at Acme Pharma

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Ravi. We supply industrial chemicals to pharma — may I ask which chemicals you currently source?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Mainly glycerine and acetic acid, around 8 tonnes per month combined

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: And how is your current supplier on pricing and delivery?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Delivery has been delayed twice this quarter, that hurts production. We're looking at alternatives now

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's exactly where our 4-hour quote SLA helps. Can we send you a quote within 4 hours for glycerine and acetic acid?
